name: Westcliffe Farmers Market

Products.value: Local produce, local art and handcrafted artisan goods, herbal products, honey, fresh baked goods, locally raised meat, Amish foods/crafts

Address.value: Jess Price Park, 315 Main St, Westcliffe, CO 81252

notes: On-file website is live and confirmed official (westcliffefarmersmarket.com). Address confirmed to match on-file address (315 Main St), with the added detail that the market is held at Jess Price Park. Could not verify SNAP/EBT/Double Up acceptance, phone number, ADA accessibility, or certified organic status on the official site. On-file Facebook URL (https://www.facebook.com/WestcliffeFarmersMarket) could not be fetched to verify content (Facebook blocks scraping), so it was not re-confirmed or changed but appears to match the market name and was left as-is rather than overwritten; no Instagram link found on the official site.
